data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a digital signature from the site supervisor in the construction site report. While the linked use case mentions that the site supervisor signs the report digitally, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this feature through API reads or persisted state checks. This lack of verification leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not sufficiently demonstrate that the digital signature functionality is operational.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the digital signature feature.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
